overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Bangkok is the vibrant capital of **Thailand**, known for its ornate shrines, bustling street life, and iconic waterways. It is a city of contrasts, where tradition meets modernity, offering incredible food, shopping, and historical sites.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Singapore City, the capital of **Singapore**, is a global financial center and a tropical island city-state. Famous for its futuristic architecture, green spaces like Gardens by the Bay, and diverse culinary scene, it is a hub of innovation and culture.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Kuala Lumpur (KL) is the capital of **Malaysia**, recognizable worldwide by the iconic Petronas Twin Towers. It’s a dynamic city with a rich tapestry of different cultures, offering modern skyscrapers, colonial architecture, and vibrant markets.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Thimphu is the capital and largest city of **Bhutan**. Unique for not having traffic lights, the city maintains its traditional architecture and values, focusing on Gross National Happiness. It’s a cultural center nestled in the Himalayan mountains.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Kathmandu is the capital of **Nepal**, set in a valley surrounded by the Himalayas. It is famous for its history, ancient temples, shrines, and bustling city squares like Durbar Square, making it a cultural and historical jewel of South Asia.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Colombo is the commercial capital and largest city of **Sri Lanka**. It is a busy port city on the island's west coast, blending colonial buildings with modern high-rises, reflecting its rich history and role as a major economic hub.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Tokyo is the bustling capital of **Japan**, known for its ultramodern cityscapes, neon-lit skyscrapers, and deep-rooted traditional culture. It offers world-class dining, cutting-edge technology, and historical temples side by side.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Paris is the capital of **France**, celebrated globally as the 'City of Love' and the home of the Eiffel Tower. It is a world center for art, fashion, gastronomy, and culture, defined by its beautiful architecture and historical landmarks.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Moscow is the capital city of **Russia** and a major political, economic, cultural, and scientific center. It is famous for its historic sites like the Kremlin and Red Square, iconic cathedrals, and world-renowned performing arts.
